    Methods in controller that return User
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static User
    Auth.findUser(String username)
    Finds and retrieves a User object based on the provided username.
    Methods in controller with parameters of type User
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    Auth.registerUser(User newUser)
    Registers a new user in the system if the username is not already taken.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    SystemManager.getCurrentUser()
    Gets the currently logged-in user.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    SystemManager.loginUser(User user)
